description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

�新 New Listing (Posted: June 1, 2026)

Hanno City is recruiting tenants for public housing units.

【Application Period】
June 1, 2026 (Monday) to June 15, 2026 (Monday) – postmark date counts as submission date

【How to Apply】
Read the recruitment information carefully. Fill out the application form and mail it in the enclosed reply envelope.

【Occupancy Requirements】
• You must provide one guarantor at move-in
• Dogs, cats, and other pets are prohibited
• Repairs before move-in will be kept to the bare minimum

【Important Notes】
• After you submit your application form, you generally cannot change any information you wrote
• Application forms and all submitted documents will not be returned
• Applications with missing documents will not be accepted

Tenants will be selected by lottery and eligibility screening as a general rule.

【Contact】
Saitama Prefecture Housing Supply Corporation – Kawagoe Branch
Phone: 049-227-6418
〒350-1101 Kawagoe, Aza-Matoba 2218-4, Bell Art 301

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/tosikensetubu/kenchikuka/shieijyuuraku/7608.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Public Housing – Tenant Recruitment (June 2026)
